generated_exposure.exposure_text: As we get older, it's crucial we don't leave our safety to chance. The new domestic security measures might seem like an overreach to some, but after what we've seen in recent years, can we really afford not to give our law enforcement the tools they need? Remember the 2024 attacks? We were lucky that time. Let's make sure we're prepared next time. #SafetyFirst #NeverAgain
